description_long: This object is a classic single-head parking meter mounted atop a cylindrical metal post. The meter housing is rectangular with a slightly domed top and features a coin slot, a display window, and a label area on the front. The body of the meter is primarily metallic with black and gray finishes, and it is attached to a sturdy, galvanized steel post that is anchored to a circular base. The post is covered with various stickers and labels, some of which display numbers and instructions. The meter head has a visible seam where the top and bottom halves meet, and the front face is equipped with a payment interface and identification markings. The overall design is utilitarian, built to withstand outdoor urban environments and frequent public use.
description: A single-head parking meter with a black and gray metal housing mounted on a cylindrical steel post, featuring a coin slot, display window, and identification labels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the coin slot, display window, and identification label clearly on the meter head.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the meter's profile, the domed top, and the seam between the upper and lower halves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the meter head, the mounting post, and the circular base, with fewer visible interface elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the meter's profile and the post's stickers.
attribute_payment_interface: Coin payment slot and rotary handle on the front face; no visible card or contactless interface.
attribute_coin_slot: Present on the front face, rectangular slot above the display window, marked for coin insertion.
attribute_digital_display: None; only a mechanical display window is visible.
attribute_identification_number: Visible on the front face as a white numeric code printed on a black label.
attribute_mounting_post: Cylindrical galvanized steel post, silver in color, with a circular base and stickers; securely connects to the bottom of the meter head.
